subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This is a servant who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, who hath confessed Thy oneness and acknowledged Thy singleness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذا عبد آمن بک و بایاتک و اقر بوحدانیتک و اعترف بفردانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @knowledge; recognition of God
